headline: FS KKR Capital Corp. Closes $150 Million Convertible Preferred Stock Issuance in Connection with Strategic Value Enhancement Actions
summary: FS KKR Capital Corp. (NYSE: FSK), or the Company, today announced it has closed its previously announced $150 million issuance of cumulative convertible perpetual preferred stock (the "Convertible Preferred Stock"), purchased by KKR Alternative Assets L.P., a subsidiary of KKR. The Company intends to use the proceeds from the issuance for general corporate purposes, including funding its common stock repurchase program or for debt repayment.
